title: Parfait Day: Layers of Yummy Fun!
story: Every November 25, people celebrate National Parfait Day by creating colorful layers of deliciousness! Families gather in kitchens to stack yogurt, granola, fresh berries, and whipped cream in tall glasses. Some people make breakfast parfaits with oats and fruit, while others go wild with ice cream and chocolate chips. Social media fills with photos of these beautiful layered treats that look almost too pretty to eat!
activity_question: What do people commonly layer in parfaits on National Parfait Day?
follow_up_question: What's the most creative parfait combination you can imagine?
